audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. Data columns are correctly retained per MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS via min_epoch_data_availability_boundary calculation (chain_spec.rs:823-833), which computes retention boundary and is enforced by try_prune_blobs pruning logic. The is_peer_das_enabled_for_epoch check (L3249) gates data column pruning to only run once blobs from pre-Fulu era are cleared, preventing premature deletion during the transition period.
